panels.narration:
肺癌晚期，陈北辰活不过三个月。
可他万万没想到，比他先死的，是他的婚姻。
病房里只有他一个人，死寂得能听见监护仪的滴滴声。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, hospital room, white walls, medical equipment, heart rate monitor, IV drip, hospital bed, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, medium shot, cinematic composition,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
手机突然亮了，是一条微信消息。
「北辰哥，不好意思啊，这几天太忙了，没去医院看你。你好好养病，等我忙完这阵就来看你。——柳安然」
陈北辰盯着那条消息，突然笑了。

dialogue.speaker: 柳安然
dialogue.text: 北辰哥，不好意思啊，这几天太忙了，没去医院看你。你好好养病，等我忙完这阵就来看你。——柳安然

panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, hospital room, white walls, medical equipment, heart rate monitor, IV drip, hospital bed, , wide shot, atmospheric,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
都这时候了，她还在演。
如果不是临死前的那一刻，他或许还会被这条消息感动，还会相信这个他爱了七年的女人真的在乎他。
可就在三天前，他用柳安然的手机转账，意外看到了她的转账记录。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, hospital room, white walls, medical equipment, heart rate monitor, IV drip, hospital bed, , wide shot, atmospheric,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
那一笔笔进账，每一笔都像一把刀，插在他的心上。
这七年里，他的老婆柳安然，累计收到周子轩转账三百五十万。
周子轩，他的大学同学，他最好的兄弟，当年结婚时还给他当伴郎！
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, hospital room, white walls, medical equipment, heart rate monitor, IV drip, hospital bed, , wide shot, atmospheric,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
毕业典礼上，陈北辰站在人群中，眼睛一直在搜索那道熟悉的身影。
「同学，请问计算机系在哪边？」
就是这句话，上一世就是这句话，拉开了他悲剧的序幕。

dialogue.speaker: 柳安然
dialogue.text: 同学，请问计算机系在哪边？

panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, graduation ceremony, university campus, outdoor venue, crowd of students, sunny day, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, medium shot, cinematic composition,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
陈北辰循声望去，柳安然正朝着他走过来。
她今天穿了一条白色连衣裙，长发披肩，看起来清新脱俗。
如果不是亲身经历过，如果不是死过一次，陈北辰或许还会被她的外表迷惑。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, graduation ceremony, university campus, outdoor venue, crowd of students, sunny day, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, medium shot, cinematic composition,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
「计算机系？」陈北辰微微一笑，「那边。」
「谢谢。」柳安然笑了笑，转身就要走。
按照上一世的剧本，陈北辰应该会主动追上去，询问她的名字和专业。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, graduation ceremony, university campus, outdoor venue, crowd of students, sunny day, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, close-up portrait, emotional, dramatic,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
可这一次，陈北辰只是冷冷地看着她的背影，没有任何行动。
柳安然走了几步，发现身后没有动静，忍不住回过头。
这个男生怎么回事？按照她预想的剧本，他应该会追上来要联系方式才对。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, graduation ceremony, university campus, outdoor venue, crowd of students, sunny day, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, medium shot, cinematic composition,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
陈北辰和柳安然"偶然"确定了恋爱关系。
一切都在按照柳安然的剧本走。
她主动表白，主动献身，主动谈婚论嫁。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, modern interior, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, close-up portrait, emotional, dramatic,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
陈北辰全程配合，扮演着一个深情款款的男朋友角色。
同时，他也在暗中收集证据。
两个人开始频繁"偶遇"。
panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, modern interior, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, medium shot, cinematic composition,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
「北辰，这是我朋友，子轩。」柳安然介绍道。
「你好，我是周子轩。」周子轩笑着伸出手。
「北辰经常提起你，说你们是大学最好的兄弟。」柳安然说道。

dialogue.speaker: 柳安然
dialogue.text: 北辰经常提起你，说你们是大学最好的兄弟。

panels.prompt: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, cinematic lighting, modern interior, 1boy, black hair, short hair, handsome, 22 years old, Chinese male, slender build, close-up portrait, emotional, dramatic,
panels.negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, blurry, distorted face, extra limbs, anime, cartoon, ugly

panels.narration:
「哈哈，是啊，北辰是我最好的兄弟！」周子轩热情地握着陈北辰的手。
两个虚伪的男人相视一笑。
在心里互相问候了对方的八辈祖宗。

dialogue.speaker: 陈北辰
dialogue.text: 哈哈，是啊，北辰是我最好的兄弟！
